MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
russell Rowen, Esq. for Plaintiff David Engel, also present, was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1 - Corp Grant Deed/Tax Parcel #25/3597 ----- ID/EVID.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 2 - Sale Of Interest in Co-Tenancy and Indemnity Agreement ----- ID/EVID.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 3 - Promissory Note Dtd. 6-22-01 ------------ ID/EVID.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 4 - Summons/Complaint#410587 ---------------- ID/EVID.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 5 - Copy of Email from Glenn A. Davis Dtd. 4-6-03--------------- ID/EVID.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 6 - Invoices listing------------------------- ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court continued this matter to March 9, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Counsel to submit a proposed Judgment, with the praying request, general damages and a Declaration regarding the Referee and a Backup Referee for the sale of the property.
The appearance of the plaintiff is waived and on telephone conference standby for hearing on March 9, 2004.
Plaintiff is ordered to appear at the CONFIRMATION of THE SALE.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the exhibits.
